title: The Prosperous Voyage.
content:
The mist is fast clearing.
    And radiant is heaven,
    Whilst AEolus loosens
    Our anguish-fraught bond.
    The zephyrs are sighing,
    Alert is the sailor.
    Quick! nimbly be plying!
    The billows are riven,
    The distance approaches;
    I see land beyond!
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Prosperous Voyage."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
